title: ACTREC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Electrical Engineer Posts
description: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Electrical Engineer Jobs. Those candidates who qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech in Electrical Engineering can grab this chance and apply for the ACTREC Recruitment 2026 . Interested candidates can apply online on or before the last date of application. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs in 2026 that you can all apply...
